prompt: A cinematic photorealistic wide shot of a lonely beach beside a decaying industrial coastal town under an enormous summer sky. In the foreground, one young woman is seen from behind, standing still at the waterline and facing the sea, wearing a wide straw hat, a loose white short-sleeve shirt, and faded blue denim overalls, with long dark hair visible beneath the hat. The beach is dirty and littered with exact visible debris types including 6 or more rusty metal barrels, broken wood, plastic trash, scattered scrap metal, and drifted industrial waste. To the left, a row of weathered concrete factory and apartment-like buildings stretches into the distance, with cracked facades, broken windows, utility poles, power lines, and a tall smokestack near the center background. To the right, the ocean is muted blue with small foamy waves, and a ruined pier or line of old posts extends into the water. In the far background, low hazy mountains run along the horizon. The dominant focus is the sky: towering colossal white cumulonimbus clouds filling most of the upper half of the image, highly detailed, sunlit, dense, and majestic against a deep blue sky, creating a dramatic contrast with the bleak polluted shore. Natural daylight, realistic shadows, high detail, subdued documentary color grading, melancholic mood, environmental-collapse atmosphere, sharp focus, 24mm lens composition, eye-level perspective.
